meaning: n.[动]狗的一种,国防自卫队,地籍册
examples: The tan-coloured dog looks suspiciously like a pit bull terrier.
On a snorkeling trip in Bermuda a few years ago, we met a terrier named Lexi, who liked to fetch rocks.
The bull-terrier sat on the grass.
He lives there with his tiny Yorkshire Terrier, Little Shubert (after the 42nd Street theater).
And, yet, the great campaigner, the smooth fox terrier, placed third in the terrier group.
